mapper.sql: homepage_id, seq, req_type, req_id, req_name, req_organ_div , req_organ_code, req_tel, requer_name, requer_tel, req_email, req_title , req_content, req_ip, student_id, pc_spec, crt_dt, support_div , supporter, support_clerk, support_tel, subcontractor, support_content , support_content2, special_feature, supplies_support, satisfaction, comments , process_state, support_state, comp_dt, internet_line, orther, student_name, student_tel , student_hp, zip_code, student_addr1, student_addr2, service_name, support_id, service_id , eduinfo_agree, mod_dt, exp_dt, delete_yn, TO_CHAR(hope_req_dt,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS hope_req_dt , member_key, categories
mapper.select:
SELECT MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 1, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as SUN, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 2, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as MON, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 3, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as TUE, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 4, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as WED, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 5, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as THU, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 6, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as FRI, MIN( DECODE( TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'D'), 7, TO_CHAR(DAYS, 'FMDD'))) as SAT FROM ( SELECT (A.BASE_MON + ROWNUM -1) AS days, A.BASE_MON, ((TRUNC(BASE_MON + ROWNUM - 1, 'D') - TRUNC(TRUNC(BASE_MON + ROWNUM - 1, 'Y'), 'D')) / 7 + 1) AS WEEK_NUM FROM (SELECT TO_DATE (#{plan_date}, 'yyyy-MM') BASE_MON FROM DUAL) A, DICTIONARY B ) C
WHERE C.DAYS <= LAST_DAY(BASE_MON) GROUP BY WEEK_NUM ORDER BY WEEK_NUM

SELECT
FROM FIELD_SUPPORT WHERE 1=1 AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND REQ_ID = #{req_id}

SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_CALENDAR_MANAGE B WHERE FIELD_SUPPORT.HOMEPAGE_ID = B.HOMEPAGE_ID AND FIELD_SUPPORT.HOMEPAGE_ID = 'h19' AND B.DATE_TYPE = '1' AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(FIELD_SUPPORT.hope_req_dt,'YYYY-MM-DD') <= B.END_DATE AND TO_CHAR(FIELD_SUPPORT.hope_req_dt,'YYYY-MM-DD') >= B.START_DATE) AS closed_day, TO_CHAR(hope_req_dt,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS plan_date FROM FIELD_SUPPORT WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND seq = #{seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE FIELD_SUPPORT SET req_name = #{req_name}, requer_name = #{requer_name}, req_organ_code = #{req_organ_code}, requer_tel = #{requer_tel}, hope_req_dt = #{hope_req_dt}, req_title = #{req_title}, req_content = #{req_content}, categories = #{categories}, process_state = #{process_state} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND seq = #{seq}

UPDATE FIELD_SUPPORT SET support_div = #{support_div}, supporter = #{supporter}, subcontractor = #{subcontractor}, support_content = #{support_content}, process_state = 'Y' WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND seq = #{seq}
mapper.delete: UPDATE FIELD_SUPPORT SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND seq = #{seq}
mapper.select: SELECT START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V_1) AS IMSI_V1, SUM(IMSI_V_2) AS IMSI_V2, SUM(IMSI_V_1 + IMSI_V_2) AS IMSI_V3 FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(HOPE_REQ_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, DECODE(PROCESS_STATE,'N', 1, 'Y', 0) AS IMSI_V_1, DECODE(PROCESS_STATE,'Y', 1, 'N', 0) AS IMSI_V_2 FROM FIELD_SUPPORT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ) WHERE TO_DATE(START_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd') BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{start_date},'yyyy-MM-dd') AND TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') GROUP BY ROLLUP(START_DATE) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

SELECT START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V_1) AS IMSI_V1, SUM(IMSI_V_2) AS IMSI_V2, SUM(IMSI_V_1 + IMSI_V_2) AS IMSI_V3 FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(HOPE_REQ_DT, 'YYYY') AS YEAR, TO_CHAR(HOPE_REQ_DT, 'YYYY-MM') AS START_DATE, DECODE(PROCESS_STATE,'N', 1, 'Y', 0) AS IMSI_V_1, DECODE(PROCESS_STATE,'Y', 1, 'N', 0) AS IMSI_V_2 FROM FIELD_SUPPORT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ) WHERE YEAR = #{start_year} GROUP BY ROLLUP (START_DATE) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC

SELECT START_DATE, SUM(IMSI_V_1) AS IMSI_V1, SUM(IMSI_V_2) AS IMSI_V2, SUM(IMSI_V_1 + IMSI_V_2) AS IMSI_V3 FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(HOPE_REQ_DT, 'YYYY') AS START_DATE, DECODE(PROCESS_STATE,'N', 1, 'Y', 0) AS IMSI_V_1, DECODE(PROCESS_STATE,'Y', 1, 'N', 0) AS IMSI_V_2 FROM FIELD_SUPPORT WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ) WHERE START_DATE BETWEEN #{start_year} and #{end_year} GROUP BY ROLLUP (START_DATE) ORDER BY START_DATE DESC
